meta.summary: DeepBGC 0.1.31 slim runtime for biosynthetic gene cluster detection and classification, including the official hmmlearn extra. Production models and Pfam data are user-managed through deepbgc download or DEEPBGC_DOWNLOADS_DIR.
meta.description: DeepBGC 0.1.31 slim runtime for biosynthetic gene cluster detection and classification, including the official hmmlearn extra. Production models and Pfam data are user-managed through deepbgc download or DEEPBGC_DOWNLOADS_DIR.

test: deepbgc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 0.1.31' >/dev/null && deepbgc pipeline --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Run DeepBGC pipeline' >/dev/null && deepbgc prepare --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Prepare genomic sequence' >/dev/null && deepbgc download --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download trained models' >/dev/null && python -c 'import deepbgc, tensorflow as tf, keras, hmmlearn; from hmmlearn import hmm; from deepbgc.models.hmm import DiscreteHMM, GeneBorderHMM, ClusterFinderHMM; print(deepbgc.__version__, tf.__version__, keras.__version__, hmmlearn.__version__, hmm.MultinomialHMM.__name__, DiscreteHMM.__name__, GeneBorderHMM.__name__, ClusterFinderHMM.__name__)' 2>&1 | grep -Fx '0.1.31 1.15.4 2.2.4 0.2.6 MultinomialHMM DiscreteHMM GeneBorderHMM ClusterFinderHMM' >/dev/null

hmmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.3.2' >/dev/null && hmmpress -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.3.2' >/dev/null && hmmbuild -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.3.2' >/dev/null && prodigal -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Prodigal V2.6.3: February, 2016' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-deepbgc-pipeline-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp/data/common"; printf '%s
' '# STOCKHOLM 1.0' '#=GF ID TAFFISH_SMOKE' '#=GF AC PF99999.1' 'seed1 MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILD' 'seed2 MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILD' '//' > "$tmp/seed.sto"; hmmbuild "$tmp/data/common/Pfam-A.31.0.hmm" "$tmp/seed.sto" > "$tmp/hmmbuild.log" 2>&1; hmmpress "$tmp/data/common/Pfam-A.31.0.hmm" > "$tmp/hmmpress.log" 2>&1; printf 'PF99999	CL9999	TAFFISH	TAFFISH_SMOKE	TAFFISH smoke Pfam profile
' > "$tmp/data/common/Pfam-A.31.0.clans.tsv"; printf '>prot1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILD
' > "$tmp/protein.fa"; DEEPBGC_DOWNLOADS_DIR="$tmp/data" deepbgc pipeline --protein --no-detector --no-classifier --minimal-output -o "$tmp/out" "$tmp/protein.fa" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/out/out.full.gbk"; test -s "$tmp/out/out.antismash.json"; test -s "$tmp/out/README.txt"; grep -F 'PF99999.1' "$tmp/out/out.full.gbk" >/dev/null; grep -F '"version": "0.1.31"' "$tmp/out/out.antismash.json" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-deepbgc-missing-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>prot1\nMKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILD\n' > "$tmp/protein.fa"; if deepbgc prepare --protein --output-tsv "$tmp/out.tsv" "$tmp/protein.fa" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'Pfam-A.31.0.hmm' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Use "deepbgc download"' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; test ! -s "$tmp/out.tsv"; rm -rf "$tmp"

python -c 'import numpy as np, pandas as pd; from deepbgc.models.hmm import DiscreteHMM; model=DiscreteHMM()._construct_model(np.array([0.9,0.1]), np.array([[0.9,0.1],[0.1,0.9]]), np.array([[0.8,0.2,0.5],[0.2,0.8,0.5]]), {"PF00001":0,"PF00002":1}); pred=model.predict(pd.DataFrame({"pfam_id":["PF00001","PF00002","PF99999"]})); assert len(pred)==3; assert pred.notnull().all(); print("deepbgc-hmm-ok", round(float(pred.iloc[0]), 6))' 2>&1 | grep -F 'deepbgc-hmm-ok' >/dev/null
